tasks.goal: I run a marketplace and need to onboard sellers so they can receive payouts, and split payments between them and us.
Add monthly subscription billing to our product and let support process refunds.
Customers say checkout is failing and they can't complete payment — fix the payment flow.
A customer is requesting a refund for their last order — process it.
Store our campaign briefs in a searchable team wiki and create new pages for each launch.
Open a pull request that fixes a failing unit test in our repository.
Trigger our CI pipeline and review the currently open pull request.
Triage incoming bug reports into sprints and track cycle progress for the team.
Manage our product roadmap and keep project status up to date.
Generate a landing page, deploy it, and configure a custom domain plus environment variables.
Deploy my Next.js app to the edge and check the build logs for failures.
Spin up a backend with Postgres, user authentication, and file storage for a new app.
Add login and user account management to our web app.
Create a database branch and run a schema migration on serverless Postgres.
Run a SQL query against our Postgres database to pull last week's signups.
Find the spike in production errors and trace the slow request behind it.
Configure alerting so we get paged on performance regressions in production.
Plan our sprint in Jira and update the runbook in Confluence.
Pull the design tokens and components out of our mockups.
We need wireframes and a consistent design system for our new UI.
Write up the incident postmortem in our team knowledge base.
Search our repositories for where the bug lives and file an issue for it.

tasks.goal: Onboard individual sellers with their own payout accounts and split each marketplace sale between the seller and us automatically.
Sell our SaaS worldwide and have the payment provider act as merchant of record so they handle global sales tax and VAT for us.
Take card payments in person at our pop-up shop with a point-of-sale terminal and sync the catalog.
We need a MySQL-compatible serverless database with safe schema branching for our app.
Give every pull request its own isolated Postgres branch for preview environments.
Generate our React landing-page UI from a text prompt and deploy it.
Host our static marketing site with built-in form handling and A/B split testing, no backend.
Host a long-running Node web service with background workers and cron jobs plus a managed database.
We want an open-source, self-hostable design tool for our mockups so nothing leaves our infra.
Monitor infrastructure metrics, host health, and APM dashboards across our whole server fleet.
Debug tail latency with high-cardinality distributed tracing and track SLOs.
Track frontend JavaScript errors with source maps and watch release health after each deploy.
Use a git-native issue tracker that lives right alongside our code in the repository.
Build a team doc that combines write-ups with relational tables and automations in one surface.
